description: Retrieves a list of all SD-WAN configurations associated with the UI account making the API call.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Generic response data, specific schema depends on the endpoint

children.name: id
children.description: Unique identifier of the SD-WAN config

children.name: type
children.description: Type of SD-WAN config - Currently only supports sdwan-hbsp

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/sd-wan-configs", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
